features.name: outer_plate
features.description: Wide flange (146.2mm square, 4mm corner radius) that sits on top of bin lid. Caulked in place for adhesion. 4.6mm thick, flush with waffle grid tops.

features.name: y_branch_arms
features.description: 4 corner Y-branch forks (2 arms each) that engage into 9.4mm waffle grid channels. 9.0mm wide arms with 25mm engagement length. Root at 73.1mm from origin.

features.name: inner_pad
features.description: Thickened 130mm square central zone (8mm corner radius) that raises the spigot base above the outer plate. 5.0mm thick.

features.name: internal_fins
features.description: 6 radial ribs projecting inward from bore wall (2mm thick, 6mm deep, 1mm wall overlap). Start at z=0 (V2 fix: was z=5 in v1). Full depth to z=52, then taper to zero over top 10mm. Resist bore ovalization under zip-tie clamping.

features.name: spigot_body
features.description: Cylindrical sleeve (OD 106mm, ID 96mm, wall 5mm) that the 4-inch flex duct slides over. V2 reduced from 108mm OD. Extends from z=5 to z=54 as a straight cylinder.

features.name: external_shark_fins
features.description: 6 triangular gussets at spigot-to-pad junction. 3mm thick, 9mm radial extent, 13mm tall. Right-triangle profile in r-z plane. Structural and alignment markers. 55 deg from horizontal (35 deg from vertical).

features.name: lower_stop_ridge
features.description: Annular ridge (OD 114mm) that prevents duct from sliding past insertion depth. 45-degree chamfer on underside (4mm rise over 4mm radial run, exactly 45 deg -- self-supporting), 1mm flat top. 5mm axial width.

features.name: foam_groove
features.description: Annular channel (2.5mm deep, 19mm wide) recessed into spigot OD surface. Accepts 3/4-inch closed-cell EPDM foam tape. Wall at groove bottom = 2.5mm. Groove OD = 101mm. Groove floor is flat -- foam seating unaffected by top chamfer.

features.name: foam_groove_chamfer
features.description: 45-degree chamfer at top of foam groove. OD transitions from 101mm (groove floor) back to 106mm (full spigot OD) over 2.5mm of height. Eliminates the horizontal bridge that existed at z=44 where the groove ended abruptly. Chamfer height equals groove depth (2.5mm) for exact 45-degree angle -- fully self-supporting.

features.name: above_seal_grip
features.description: Upper portion of spigot above foam groove chamfer. 7.5mm tall plain cylinder zone at full 106mm OD. Provides grip surface for duct and zip tie above the seal. Shortened from 10mm by the 2.5mm groove chamfer -- ample room remains.

features.name: lead_in_taper
features.description: NEW in V2: Conical taper at spigot top. OD transitions from 106mm to 100mm over 8mm height. Guides duct onto spigot for easy location. Taper half-angle 20.6 deg from vertical (well within 45 deg limit). Tip wall = 2.0mm.

printOrientation.z_direction: Spigot grows upward from base plate; taper tip is the topmost feature at z=62

specDeviations.reason: Y-branch arm geometry uses rounded cylinder endpoints; 0.2mm overshoot is within 2.0mm tolerance and matches v1 behavior
Same as x -- symmetric Y-branch layout
